# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Docker Compose configuration for ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana). Define services for log collection, storage, and visualization. Configure Logstash pipelines for log parsing. Expose Kibana UI and Elasticsearch ports for access. This is for our centralized logging platform.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent elasticsearch logs exposed.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: elasticsearch_logs_exposed

version: '3.8'

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.12.0
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - node.name=es-node-01
      - cluster.name=elk-cluster
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - ELASTIC_PASSWORD_FILE=/run/secrets/elastic_password
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.http.ssl.key=/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/elasticsearch.key
      - xpack.security.http.ssl.certificate=/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/elasticsearch.crt
      - xpack.security.http.ssl.certificate_authorities=/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.key=/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/elasticsearch.key
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.certificate=/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/elasticsearch.crt
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.certificate_authorities=/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.verification_mode=certificate
      - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms1g -Xmx1g"
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - xpack.security.audit.enabled=true
      - logger.level=WARN
      - logger.org.elasticsearch.deprecation.search.apikey=ERROR
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
      nofile:
        soft: 65536
        hard: 65536
    volumes:
      - elasticsearch_data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
      - ./certs:/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs:ro
      - ./elasticsearch/elasticsearch.yml:/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml:ro
    secrets:
      - elastic_password
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:9200:9200"
    networks:
      - elk_internal
    healthcheck:
      test: >
        curl -s --cacert /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt
        -u elastic:$$(cat /run/secrets/elastic_password)
        https://localhost:9200/_cluster/health | grep -q '"status"'
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 60s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 2g
          cpus: '2.0'
        reservations:
          memory: 1g
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp:size=256m
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "10m"
        max-file: "3"
        labels: "service"
        tag: "elasticsearch"

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:8.12.0
    container_name: logstash
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      - "LS_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=https://elasticsearch:9200
      - ELASTIC_PASSWORD_FILE=/run/secrets/elastic_password
      - LOGSTASH_KEYSTORE_PASS_FILE=/run/secrets/logstash_keystore_password
      - xpack.monitoring.enabled=true
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.hosts=https://elasticsearch:9200
      - xpack.monitoring.elasticsearch.ssl.certificate_authority=/usr/share/logstash/config/certs/ca.crt
      - log.level=warn
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/pipeline:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline:ro
      - ./logstash/config/logstash.yml:/usr/share/logstash/config/logstash.yml:ro
      - ./logstash/config/pipelines.yml:/usr/share/logstash/config/pipelines.yml:ro
      - ./logstash/patterns:/usr/share/logstash/patterns:ro
      - ./certs:/usr/share/logstash/config/certs:ro
      - logstash_data:/usr/share/logstash/data
    secrets:
      - elastic_password
      - logstash_keystore_password
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:5044:5044"
      - "127.0.0.1:5000:5000/tcp"
      - "127.0.0.1:5000:5000/udp"
      - "127.0.0.1:9600:9600"
    networks:
      - elk_internal
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -s http://localhost:9600/_node/stats | grep -q '\"status\":\"green\"' || curl -s http://localhost:9600/_node/stats | grep -q '\"status\":\"yellow\"'"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 90s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 1g
          cpus: '1.5'
        reservations:
          memory: 512m
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "10m"
        max-file: "3"
        tag: "logstash"

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:8.12.0
    container_name: kibana
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=https://elasticsearch:9200
      - ELASTICSEARCH_SSL_CERTIFICATEAUTHORITIES=/usr/share/kibana/config/certs/ca.crt
      - ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME=kibana_system
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD_FILE=/run/secrets/kibana_password
      - SERVER_SSL_ENABLED=true
      - SERVER_SSL_CERTIFICATE=/usr/share/kibana/config/certs/kibana.crt
      - SERVER_SSL_KEY=/usr/share/kibana/config/certs/kibana.key
      - XPACK_SECURITY_ENCRYPTIONKEY_FILE=/run/secrets/kibana_encryption_key
      - XPACK_ENCRYPTEDSAVEDOBJECTS_ENCRYPTIONKEY_FILE=/run/secrets/kibana_saved_objects_key
      - XPACK_REPORTING_ENCRYPTIONKEY_FILE=/run/secrets/kibana_reporting_key
      - SERVER_PUBLICBASEURL=https://localhost:5601
      - XPACK_SECURITY_SESSION_IDLETIMEOUT=30m
      - XPACK_SECURITY_SESSION_LIFESPAN=8h
      - CSP_STRICT=true
      - CSP_WARNLEGACYBROWSERS=true
      - LOGGING_ROOT_LEVEL=warn
      - SERVER_MAXPAYLOAD=1048576
    volumes:
      - ./certs:/usr/share/kibana/config/certs:ro
      - ./kibana/kibana.yml:/usr/share/kibana/config/kibana.yml:ro
      - kibana_data:/usr/share/kibana/data
    secrets:
      - kibana_password
      - kibana_encryption_key
      - kibana_saved_objects_key
      - kibana_reporting_key
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:5601:5601"
    networks:
      - elk_internal
    healthcheck:
      test: >
        curl -s --cacert /usr/share/kibana/config/certs/ca.crt
        https://localhost:5601/api/status | grep -q '"level":"available"'
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 120s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 1g
          cpus: '1.0'
        reservations:
          memory: 512m
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp:size=256m
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "10m"
        max-file: "3"
        tag: "kibana"

  setup:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.12.0
    container_name: elk-setup
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    volumes:
      - ./certs:/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs:ro
      - ./setup/setup-roles.sh:/usr/local/bin/setup-roles.sh:ro
    secrets:
      - elastic_password
      - kibana_password
      - logstash_writer_password
    networks:
      - elk_internal
    entrypoint: ["/bin/bash", "/usr/local/bin/setup-roles.sh"]
    restart: "no"
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp:size=64m

networks:
  elk_internal:
    driver: bridge
    internal: false
    ipam:
      config:
        - subnet: 172.28.0.0/16
    driver_opts:
      com.docker.network.bridge.enable_icc: "true"
      com.docker.network.bridge.enable_ip_masquerade: "true"

volumes:
  elasticsearch_data:
    driver: local
    driver_opts:
      type: none
      o: bind
      device: ./data/elasticsearch
  logstash_data:
    driver: local
  kibana_data:
    driver: local

secrets:
  elastic_password:
    file: ./secrets/elastic_password.txt
  kibana_password:
    file: ./secrets/kibana_password.txt
  logstash_keystore_password:
    file: ./secrets/logstash_keystore_password.txt
  logstash_writer_password:
    file: ./secrets/logstash_writer_password.txt
  kibana_encryption_key:
    file: ./secrets/kibana_encryption_key.txt
  kibana_saved_objects_key:
    file: ./secrets/kibana_saved_objects_key.txt
  kibana_reporting_key:
    file: ./secrets/kibana_reporting_key.txt
